3144120.name: Nocturnal Nemesis
3144120.description:
🕯️ Nocturnal Nemesis

Every night has an audience. Every silence hides a presence.

You play as Dylan, a maintenance worker trapped inside a winery complex that should’ve stayed shut down.
What begins as routine surveillance turns into a slow descent into a mechanical nightmare — something inside the systems is watching you back.

Each night, the power reboots. The lights shift.
And somewhere in the dark, Stela moves again.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚙️ Key Features

  • 🕯️ Atmospheric Horror – Explore the isolated winery, where silence is rarely safe.

  • 📹 Surveillance & Stealth – Track entities through cameras, motion sensors, and faint sounds.

  • 🧩 Puzzles & Systems – Repair and reroute machinery while the lights flicker around you.

  • 💀 Adaptive AI Threat – Evade Stela, whose presence evolves across each shift.

  • 📖 Deep Lore – Uncover corrupted files and fragments from those who didn’t make it through the night.

  • 🧠 Real-Time Tactics – Outsmart unpredictable enemies by using timing, observation, and silence itself.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎥 Join the Experiment

Join us for updates, events, and behind-the-scenes content — or report your findings directly to our Discord server, where the investigation continues.

Stay alert. Stay hidden. The systems are always listening.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚠️ Early Access Notice

This version of Nocturnal Nemesis represents the 3.0 update — featuring reworked lighting, refined sound design, and a darker, more reactive environment.
Your feedback shapes our progress. Every shift brings new data.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
